events.event_description: John Mercer Langston presents credentials as Chargé d'Affaires, accredited (but not commissioned) to Santo Domingo while commissioned to Haiti — establishing nonresident diplomatic relations.

evidence.quote: John Mercer Langston, Chargé d'Affaires. Appointed: 1883-11-12. Credentials presented: 1884-03-26. Transmitted recall by mail 1885-06-23. Note: Commissioned during a recess of the Senate; recommissioned on February 12, 1884, after confirmation. Commissioned or accredited to Santo Domingo.

events.event_description: Thomas Cleland Dawson presents credentials as Minister Resident/Consul General, establishing a resident legation in Santo Domingo.

evidence.quote: Thomas Cleland Dawson, Minister Resident/Consul General. Appointed: 1904-04-29. Credentials presented: 1904-07-23. Left post on 1907-05-05. Note: Commissioned during a recess of the Senate; recommissioned on December 8, 1904, after confirmation. Commissioned or accredited to Santo Domingo.

events.event_description: Avra Milvin Warren promoted to Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary, elevating the mission from a legation to an embassy.

evidence.quote: Avra Milvin Warren, Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1942-03-05. Credentials presented: 1942-07-04. Promoted to Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary 1943-04-17. Avra Milvin Warren, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1943-03-27. Credentials presented: 1943-04-17. Left post on 1944-04-22.

events.event_description: The United States severed diplomatic relations with the Dominican Republic.

evidence.quote: Henry Mark Valpey Dearborn, Chargé d'Affaires ad interim. The United States severed diplomatic relations with the Dominican Republic on 1960-08-26.

events.event_description: John Calvin Hill presents credentials as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim, resuming U.S. diplomatic representation at the embassy level.

evidence.quote: John Calvin Hill, Chargé d'Affaires ad interim. Credentials presented: 1962-01-06.

events.event_description: Normal diplomatic relations interrupted following the new unrecognized government; the U.S. suspended normal relations on 1963-09-25.

evidence.quote: John Bartlow Martin, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1962-03-02. Credentials presented: 1962-03-09. Normal relations interrupted on 1963-09-25. Note: The new Government of the Dominican Republic was still unrecognized by the United States when Martin left post on September 28, 1963.

events.event_description: William Tapley Bennett presents credentials as Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary, restoring full embassy-level diplomatic relations.

evidence.quote: William Tapley Bennett, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1964-03-04. Credentials presented: 1964-03-23. Left post on 1966-04-13.
